title: Settings
description: Manage your account preferences and application settings

currencies.baseCurrencyDescription: Your base currency is used for multi-currency conversion throughout the app. All foreign currencies will be converted to this currency in reports, dashboards, and portfolio views.
currencies.secondaryCurrencyDescription: Used as a comparison currency in amount tooltips. Select "None" to disable.
currencies.secondaryAmountsNote: Amounts will show {{currency}} equivalents in tooltips.
currencies.updateError: Failed to update base currency. Please try again.
currencies.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved currency changes. Leave without saving?

country.label: Country
country.description: Your country setting is used to apply country-specific defaults in financial tools (e.g. notary fees, mortgage rates) and to determine which tools are available to you.
country.toolNote: Some tools such as the Property Rental Simulator are only available for specific countries (currently France only).

display.title: Display Settings

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose your preferred color theme for the application

dateFormat.label: Date Format
dateFormat.description: Choose how dates are displayed throughout the application
dateFormat.updateError: Failed to update date format. Please try again.

numberFormat.label: Number Format
numberFormat.description: Choose how numbers and monetary amounts are formatted throughout the application
numberFormat.usUkDescription: Comma as thousands separator, dot as decimal point
numberFormat.europeanDescription: Dot as thousands separator, comma as decimal point
numberFormat.frenchSwissDescription: Space as thousands separator, comma as decimal point

currencyDisplay.label: Currency Display
currencyDisplay.description: Choose how monetary amounts are shown throughout the application
currencyDisplay.baseDescription: Show amounts in your base currency. Hover to see the native amount.
currencyDisplay.nativeDescription: Show amounts in their original currency. Hover to see the base currency value.
currencyDisplay.bothDescription: Show the base-currency value and the native amount inline, side by side.

display.loadError: Failed to load settings. Please refresh the page.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your account information. Password changes are in <1>Security Settings</1>.
profile.currentPasswordHint: Required for security verification when updating email
profile.uploadHint: Upload a JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image. Maximum size: 2 MB.
profile.uploadError: Failed to upload image. Please try again.
profile.removeError: Failed to remove image. Please try again.
profile.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image.
profile.imageTooLarge: Image is too large ({{size}} MB). Maximum allowed size is 2 MB.

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage your passwords and security options

loginPassword.title: Change Login Password
loginPassword.description: Update the password you use to log in to your account

masterPassword.title: Change Master Password
masterPassword.description: Update the password used to encrypt your financial data
masterPassword.criticalWarningBody: Changing your master password will re-encrypt all your financial data (accounts, transactions, assets, and liabilities). This process may take several minutes depending on the amount of data. Do not close this window during the operation.
masterPassword.newMasterPasswordPlaceholder: Enter your new master password (min 8 characters)
masterPassword.rememberNote: Make sure you remember your new master password. It cannot be recovered if lost, as it's used to encrypt your data.
masterPassword.success: Master password changed successfully. All your data has been re-encrypted.
masterPassword.failedPassword: Failed to change password. Please check your current password and try again.
masterPassword.failedMasterPassword: Failed to change master password. Please check your current password and try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactor.comingSoonNote: Two-factor authentication using authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy) or SMS codes.
